meaning: n.鄂伦春族 鄂伦春族人
examples: Olunchun is a nation for forest hunting, and has her own forest culture.
Olunchun people live in Mts. Daxinganling and Mts. Xiaoxinganling, which are full of natural resources.
This article is about the investigation on the stereoscopic vision of 338 Olunchun living in Shibazhan of Tahe County and Baiyin of Huma County.
